channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 17th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stafford Close, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Toilet outside flats, 17th July
item.description:
Has been there for weeks, highly unhygienic and a waste hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Georges Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Daily flytipper, 17th July
item.description:
The people that live opposite this dumped rubbish put stuff there almost every day, there is possible evidence of the offenders in the rubbish on this occasion

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenmoor Road, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Urine bins and dog poo, 17th July
item.description:
Multiple issues of poo urine and bins left outside the wall

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Balaclava Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cars keep parking on double yellow lines, 17th July
item.description:
These cars have been parking here on double yellow lines for months. They rev their engines repeatedly after midnight and wake up nearby residents night after night. They are creating a bottleneck on a very busy cycle route outside Pub on the Park

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Martello Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found, 17th July
item.description:
A NCIL Daily Survey problem has been found by Brent Council
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Granville Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Flies, 17th July
item.description:
Had about 50-60 flies enter my window from the bins. I’m unsure if the bins need cleaning or if something is rotting. But it’s very unhygienic.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Clissold Crescent, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on fence, 17th July
item.description:
This graffiti has been only partially removed

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Johns Park, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Over grown shrubs / thorns, 17th July
item.description:
Very overgrown bushes and thorns coming into gardens in front

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Raglan Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Whole sofa dumped covering the pavement, 17th July
item.description:
Whole sofa has been dumped on the pavement completely blocking it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car has been abandoned on street for several weeks now, 17th July
item.description:
There is a black peugeot that has been abandoned on Highland Road for several weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Highland Road, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside no.76 Priory Park Road, 17th July
item.description:
Paving slab completely cracked with loose pieces. Dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Priory Park Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brickwork in flower bed needs re-pointing, 17th July
item.description:
Bricks have come loose on the corner of the flower bed. It's steadily been getting worse. Should be easy for someone to point up in 30 mins max. Be good to get it done before it gets any worse.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard on footpath knocked over, 17th July
item.description:
One of the bollards that act as width restrictors on the pathway has been knocked over, presumably reversed I to by a vehicle. Entrance to the green off St Georges Road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th July
item.description:
Fly tipping in 100 Greenwich South street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Greenwich South Street, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging hedge and tree on public footpath., 17th July
item.description:
The overhanging hedge and tree are growing rapidly and very soon will be taking more of the public footpath with the potential to cause harm to pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stuart Road, East Wickham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: N17 0de, 17th July
item.description:
The vehicle has been abandoned for over a month unable to contact the owner , presently the vehicle is being used almost every night by ppl on drugs entering into the vehicle and making noise it's becoming regular these are facts not fiction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Altair Close, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Building waste left on street by neighbour at number 39 Trehurst Street, 17th July
item.description:
Buiding work rubbish left on street my neighbour at no 39 Trehurst street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Trehurst Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Issues with traffic lights in Stockwell. Close, 17th July
item.description:
Yesterday evening (about 6.30 pm) i was in Stockwell Close to turn right into Kentish Way. The lights turned green but traffic was still coming up Kentish Way and not stopping at the lights. So I did not move. I waited another cycle for the lights to turn green. It was quite odd. This evening (Friday at 7.15 pm) I was again at the traffic lights at Stockwell Close. There was another car beside me in the other lane and cars behind me. The lights remained on red for nearly 10 minutes. I had to drive over the white line in to the pedestrian crossing before the lights eventually turned green. I think there must be an issue with the sensors or something.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stockwell Close, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chairs on road in front of 31a Crescent way, 17th July
item.description:
Builders place chairs outside 31a on public pavement and road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24-25, Crescent Way, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
